revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:November 16 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of November 16 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月16日'''は[[旧暦]][[11月 (旧暦)|11月]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[承応]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1654年]][[1月4日]]） - [[玉川上水]]の掘鑿が完工。翌年6月に完成 * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[12月17日]]） - 大坂・竹本座で二世[[竹田出雲]]・三好松洛・並木千柳の合作による人形[[浄瑠璃]]『[[義経千本桜]]』が初演 * [[安永]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1772年]][[12月10日]]） - 東海・関東・奥羽の大風水害などの凶兆により安永に改元
== 誕生日 == * [[寛永]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1638年]][[1月1日]]） - [[後西天皇]]、111代[[天皇]]（+ [[1685年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[12月29日]]） - [[北村透谷]]、[[詩人]]・[[戯曲家]]（+ [[1894年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[永正]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1508年]][[12月8日]]） - [[斯波義敏]]、[[管領]]（* [[1435年]]） * [[安永]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1780年]][[12月11日]]） - [[三浦樗良]]、[[俳人]]（* [[1729年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[11月15日 (旧暦)|11月15日]] 翌日[[11月17日 (旧暦)|11月17日]] - 前月[[10月16日 (旧暦)|10月16日]] 翌月[[12月16日 (旧暦)|12月16日]] *新暦[[11月16日]]
{{stub}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月16日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[承応]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1654年]][[1月4日]]） - [[玉川上水]]の掘鑿が完工。翌年6月に完成 * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[12月17日]]） - 大坂・竹本座で二世[[竹田出雲]]・三好松洛・並木千柳の合作による人形[[浄瑠璃]]『[[義経千本桜]]』が初演 * [[安永]]元年/[[明和]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1772年]][[12月10日]]） - [[東海地方|東海]]・[[関東地方|関東]]・[[奥羽]]の大風水害などの凶兆のため[[明和]]より安永に[[改元]]
== 誕生日 == * [[寛永]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1638年]][[1月1日]]） - [[後西天皇]]、111代[[天皇]]（+ [[1685年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[12月29日]]） - [[北村透谷]]、[[詩人]]・[[戯曲家]]（+ [[1894年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[永正]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1508年]][[12月8日]]） - [[斯波義敏]]、[[管領]]（* [[1435年]]） * [[安永]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1780年]][[12月11日]]） - [[三浦樗良]]、[[俳人]]（* [[1729年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|15|11|17|10|16|12|11|1116}}
[[ko:음력 11월 16일]] [[zh:十一月十六]] [[zh-yue:十一月十六]]

== 忌日 == * [[永正]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1508年]][[12月8日]]） - [[斯波義敏]]、[[管領]]（* [[1435年]]） * [[安永]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1780年]][[12月11日]]） - [[三浦樗良]]、[[俳人]]（* [[1729年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月16日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[承応]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1654年]][[1月4日]]） - [[玉川上水]]の掘鑿が完工。翌年6月に完成 * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[12月17日]]） - 大坂・竹本座で二世[[竹田出雲]]・三好松洛・並木千柳の合作による人形[[浄瑠璃]]『[[義経千本桜]]』が初演 * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]元年/[[明和]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1772年]][[12月10日]]） - [[東海地方|東海]]・[[関東地方|関東]]・[[奥羽]]の大風水害などの凶兆のため[[明和]]より安永に[[改元]]
== 誕生日 == * [[寛永]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1638年]][[1月1日]]） - [[後西天皇]]、111代[[天皇]]（+ [[1685年]]） * [[貞享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1687年]][[12月20日]]） - [[秋月種弘]]、第5代[[高鍋藩]]主（+ [[1753年]]） * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[1月4日]]） - [[岡部長職]]、第13代[[岸和田藩]]主・[[外交官]]・[[政治家]]（+ [[1925年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[12月29日]]） - [[北村透谷]]、[[詩人]]・[[戯曲家]]（+ [[1894年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[永正]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1508年]][[12月8日]]） - [[斯波義敏]]、[[管領]]（* [[1435年]]） * [[延宝]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1676年]][[12月20日]]） - [[藤堂高次]]、[[津藩]]主（* [[1602年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1780年]][[12月11日]]） - [[三浦樗良]]、[[俳人]]（* [[1729年]]） * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[12月20日]]） - [[月照]]、[[僧]]（* [[1813年]]）

revision.text:
{{Lunar November}} '''Lunar November16日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[承応]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1654年]][[1月4日]]） - [[玉川上水]]の掘鑿が完工。翌年6月に完成 * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[12月17日]]） - 大坂・竹本座で二世[[竹田出雲]]・三好松洛・並木千柳の合作による人形[[浄瑠璃]]『[[義経千本桜]]』が初演 * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]元年/[[明和]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1772年]][[12月10日]]） - [[東海地方|東海]]・[[関東地方|関東]]・[[奥羽]]の大風水害などの凶兆のため[[明和]]より安永に[[改元]]
== 誕生日 == * [[寛永]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1638年]][[1月1日]]） - [[後西天皇]]、111代[[天皇]]（+ [[1685年]]） * [[貞享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1687年]][[12月20日]]） - [[秋月種弘]]、第5代[[高鍋藩]]主（+ [[1753年]]） * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[1月4日]]） - [[岡部長職]]、第13代[[岸和田藩]]主・[[外交官]]・[[政治家]]（+ [[1925年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[12月29日]]） - [[北村透谷]]、[[詩人]]・[[戯曲家]]（+ [[1894年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[永正]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1508年]][[12月8日]]） - [[斯波義敏]]、[[管領]]（* [[1435年]]） * [[延宝]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1676年]][[12月20日]]） - [[藤堂高次]]、[[津藩]]主（* [[1602年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1780年]][[12月11日]]） - [[三浦樗良]]、[[俳人]]（* [[1729年]]） * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[12月20日]]） - [[月照]]、[[僧]]（* [[1813年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|15|11|17|10|16|12|11|1116}}

revision.comment: idk what haoppened but removing and re-adding the template
Text replacement - "日'''は" to "--> is the Nth day of "
Moving from [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] to [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding boilerplate intro to all the days
Text replacement - "六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]" to "六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:友引]]"
Text replacement - "旧暦}}" to "旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}"

revision.text:
'''November 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar November}} ''November 16'''<!--Lunar November16--> is the Nth day of [[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[承応]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1654年]][[1月4日]]） - [[玉川上水]]の掘鑿が完工。翌年6月に完成 * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[12月17日]]） - 大坂・竹本座で二世[[竹田出雲]]・三好松洛・並木千柳の合作による人形[[浄瑠璃]]『[[義経千本桜]]』が初演 * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]元年/[[明和]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1772年]][[12月10日]]） - [[東海地方|東海]]・[[関東地方|関東]]・[[奥羽]]の大風水害などの凶兆のため[[明和]]より安永に[[改元]]
== 誕生日 == * [[寛永]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1638年]][[1月1日]]） - [[後西天皇]]、111代[[天皇]]（+ [[1685年]]） * [[貞享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1687年]][[12月20日]]） - [[秋月種弘]]、第5代[[高鍋藩]]主（+ [[1753年]]） * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[1月4日]]） - [[岡部長職]]、第13代[[岸和田藩]]主・[[外交官]]・[[政治家]]（+ [[1925年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[12月29日]]） - [[北村透谷]]、[[詩人]]・[[戯曲家]]（+ [[1894年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[永正]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1508年]][[12月8日]]） - [[斯波義敏]]、[[管領]]（* [[1435年]]） * [[延宝]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1676年]][[12月20日]]） - [[藤堂高次]]、[[津藩]]主（* [[1602年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1780年]][[12月11日]]） - [[三浦樗良]]、[[俳人]]（* [[1729年]]） * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[12月20日]]） - [[月照]]、[[僧]]（* [[1813年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|15|11|17|10|16|12|11|1116}}

revision.text:
{{Lunar November}} '''November 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|November (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
<!--== {{Lunar November}} ''November 16'''<!--Lunar November16 is the Nth day of [[11月 (旧暦)|Lunar November]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:友引]]である。
--> == Events == * [[承応]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1654年]][[1月4日]]） - [[玉川上水]]の掘鑿が完工。翌年6月に完成 * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[12月17日]]） - 大坂・竹本座で二世[[竹田出雲]]・三好松洛・並木千柳の合作による人形[[浄瑠璃]]『[[義経千本桜]]』が初演 * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]元年/[[明和]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1772年]][[12月10日]]） - [[東海地方|東海]]・[[関東地方|関東]]・[[奥羽]]の大風水害などの凶兆のため[[明和]]より安永に[[改元]]
== Births == * [[寛永]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1638年]][[1月1日]]） - [[後西天皇]]、111代[[天皇]]（+ [[1685年]]） * [[貞享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1687年]][[12月20日]]） - [[秋月種弘]]、第5代[[高鍋藩]]主（+ [[1753年]]） * [[安政]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[1月4日]]） - [[岡部長職]]、第13代[[岸和田藩]]主・[[外交官]]・[[政治家]]（+ [[1925年]]） * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[12月29日]]） - [[北村透谷]]、[[詩人]]・[[戯曲家]]（+ [[1894年]]）
== Deaths == * [[永正]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1508年]][[12月8日]]） - [[斯波義敏]]、[[管領]]（* [[1435年]]） * [[延宝]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1676年]][[12月20日]]） - [[藤堂高次]]、[[津藩]]主（* [[1602年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1780年]][[12月11日]]） - [[三浦樗良]]、[[俳人]]（* [[1729年]]） * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[12月20日]]） - [[月照]]、[[僧]]（* [[1813年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|15|11|17|10|16|12|11|1116}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.

== Births == * [[寛永]]14年（グレゴリオ暦[[1638]][[1月1日]]） - [[後西天皇]]、111代[[天皇]]（+ [[1685]]） * [[貞享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1687]][[12月20日]]） - [[秋月種弘]]、第5代[[高鍋藩]]主（+ [[1753]]） * [[安政]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1855]][[1月4日]]） - [[岡部長職]]、第13代[[岸和田藩]]主・[[外交官]]・[[政治家]]（+ [[1925]]） * [[明治]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1868]][[12月29日]]） - [[北村透谷]]、[[詩人]]・[[戯曲家]]（+ [[1894]]）

== Events == * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 4]] ） - [[玉川上水]] の掘鑿が完工。翌年6月に完成 * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1747]] [[December 17]] ） - 大坂・竹本座で二世[[竹田出雲]] ・三好松洛・並木千柳の合作による人形[[浄瑠璃]] 『[[義経千本桜]] 』が初演 * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 1st year/[[Meiwa]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1772]] [[December 10]] ） - [[東海地方|東海]] ・[[関東地方|関東]] ・[[奥羽]] の大風水害などの凶兆のため[[Meiwa]] より安永に[[改元]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1638]] [[January 1]] ） - [[後西天皇]] 、111代[[天皇]] （+ [[1685]] ） * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1687]] [[December 20]] ） - [[秋月種弘]] 、第5代[[高鍋藩]] 主（+ [[1753]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[January 4]] ） - [[岡部長職]] 、第13代[[岸和田藩]] 主・[[外交官]] ・[[政治家]] （+ [[1925]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[December 29]] ） - [[北村透谷]] 、[[詩人]] ・[[戯曲家]] （+ [[1894]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1508]] [[December 8]] ） - [[斯波義敏]] 、[[管領]] （* [[1435]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 20]] ） - [[藤堂高次]] 、[[津藩]] 主（* [[1602]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 11]] ） - [[三浦樗良]] 、[[俳人]] （* [[1729]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 20]] ） - [[月照]] 、[[僧]] （* [[1813]] ）

[[sn:November 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 16일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十六]] [[zh:十一月十六]] [[en:draft:November 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 4]] ） - [[玉川上水]] の掘鑿が完工。翌年6月に完成 * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1747]] [[December 17]] ） - 大坂・竹本座で二世[[竹田出雲]] ・三好松洛・並木千柳の合作による人形[[浄瑠璃]] 『[[義経千本桜]] 』が初演 * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 1st year/[[Meiwa]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1772]] [[December 10]] ） - [[東海地方|東海]] ・[[関東地方|関東]] ・[[奥羽]] の大風水害などの凶兆のため[[Meiwa]] より安永に[[改元]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1638]] [[January 1]] ） - [[後西天皇]] 、111代[[天皇]] （+ [[1685]] ） * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1687]] [[December 20]] ） - [[秋月種弘]] 、第5代[[高鍋藩]] 主（+ [[1753]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[January 4]] ） - [[岡部長職]] 、第13代[[岸和田藩]] 主・[[外交官]] ・[[政治家]] （+ [[1925]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[December 29]] ） - [[北村透谷]] 、[[詩人]] ・[[戯曲家]] （+ [[1894]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1508]] [[December 8]] ） - [[斯波義敏]] 、[[管領]] （* [[1435]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 20]] ） - [[藤堂高次]] 、[[津藩]] 主（* [[1602]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 11]] ） - [[三浦樗良]] 、[[俳人]] （* [[1729]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 20]] ） - [[月照]] 、[[僧]] （* [[1813]] ）

[[sn:November 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 16일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十六]] [[zh:十一月十六]] [[en:draft:November 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 4]] ） - [[玉川上水]] の掘鑿が完工。翌年6月に完成 * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|延享}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1747]] [[December 17]] ） - 大坂・竹本座で二世[[竹田出雲]] ・三好松洛・並木千柳の合作による人形[[浄瑠璃]] 『[[義経千本桜]] 』が初演 * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 1st year/[[Meiwa]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1772]] [[December 10]] ） - [[東海地方|東海]] ・[[関東地方|関東]] ・[[奥羽]] の大風水害などの凶兆のため[[Meiwa]] より安永に[[改元]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1638]] [[January 1]] ） - [[後西天皇]] 、111代[[天皇]] （+ [[1685]] ） * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1687]] [[December 20]] ） - [[秋月種弘]] 、第5代[[高鍋藩]] 主（+ [[1753]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[January 4]] ） - [[岡部長職]] 、第13代[[岸和田藩]] 主・[[外交官]] ・[[政治家]] （+ [[1925]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[December 29]] ） - [[北村透谷]] 、[[詩人]] ・[[戯曲家]] （+ [[1894]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1508]] [[December 8]] ） - [[斯波義敏]] 、[[管領]] （* [[1435]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 20]] ） - [[藤堂高次]] 、[[津藩]] 主（* [[1602]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 11]] ） - [[三浦樗良]] 、[[俳人]] （* [[1729]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 20]] ） - [[月照]] 、[[僧]] （* [[1813]] ）
== See Also ==

[[sn:November 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 16일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十六]] [[zh:十一月十六]] [[en:draft:November 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 4]] ） - [[玉川上水]] の掘鑿が完工。翌年6月に完成 * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1747]] [[December 17]] ） - 大坂・竹本座で二世[[竹田出雲]] ・三好松洛・並木千柳の合作による人形[[Joruri]] 『[[義経千本桜]] 』が初演 * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 1st year/[[Meiwa]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1772]] [[December 10]] ） - [[東海地方|東海]] ・[[関東地方|関東]] ・[[奥羽]] の大風水害などの凶兆のため[[Meiwa]] より安永に[[改元]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1638]] [[January 1]] ） - [[後西天皇]] 、111代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1685]] ） * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1687]] [[December 20]] ） - [[秋月種弘]] 、第5代[[高鍋藩]] 主（+ [[1753]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[January 4]] ） - [[岡部長職]] 、第13代[[岸和田藩]] 主・[[外交官]] ・[[politician]] （+ [[1925]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[December 29]] ） - [[北村透谷]] 、[[詩人]] ・[[戯曲家]] （+ [[1894]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1508]] [[December 8]] ） - [[斯波義敏]] 、[[管領]] （* [[1435]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 20]] ） - [[藤堂高次]] 、[[津藩]] 主（* [[1602]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 11]] ） - [[三浦樗良]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] （* [[1729]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 20]] ） - [[月照]] 、[[Monk]] （* [[1813]] ）

[[sn:November 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 16일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十六]] [[zh:十一月十六]] [[en:draft:November 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 4]] ） - [[玉川上水]] の掘鑿が完工。翌年6月に完成 * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1747]] [[December 17]] ） - 大坂・竹本座で二世[[竹田出雲]] ・三好松洛・並木千柳の合作による人形[[Joruri]] 『[[義経千本桜]] 』が初演 * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 1st year/[[Meiwa]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1772]] [[December 10]] ） - [[東海地方|東海]] ・[[関東地方|関東]] ・[[奥羽]] の大風水害などの凶兆のため[[Meiwa]] より安永に[[改元]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1638]] [[January 1]] ） - [[後西天皇]] 、111代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1685]] ） * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1687]] [[December 20]] ） - [[秋月種弘]] 、第5代[[高鍋藩]] 主（+ [[1753]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[January 4]] ） - [[岡部長職]] 、第13代[[岸和田藩]] 主・[[外交官]] ・[[politician]] （+ [[1925]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[December 29]] ） - [[北村透谷]] 、[[詩人]] ・[[戯曲家]] （+ [[1894]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1508]] [[December 8]] ） - [[斯波義敏]] 、[[管領]] （* [[1435]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 20]] ） - [[藤堂高次]] 、[[津藩]] 主（* [[1602]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 11]] ） - [[三浦樗良]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] （* [[1729]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 20]] ） - [[月照]] 、[[Monk]] （* [[1813]] ）== See Also ==

[[sn:November 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 16일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十六]] [[zh:十一月十六]] [[en:draft:November 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 4]] ） - [[玉川上水]] の掘鑿が完工。翌年6月に完成 * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1747]] [[December 17]] ） - 大坂・竹本座で二世[[竹田出雲]] ・三好松洛・並木千柳の合作による人形[[Joruri]] 『[[義経千本桜]] 』が初演 * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 1st year/[[Meiwa]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1772]] [[December 10]] ） - [[東海地方|東海]] ・[[関東地方|関東]] ・[[奥羽]] の大風水害などの凶兆のため[[Meiwa]] より安永に[[改元]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1638]] [[January 1]] ） - [[後西天皇]] 、111代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1685]] ） * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1687]] [[December 20]] ） - [[秋月種弘]] 、第5代[[高鍋藩]] 主（+ [[1753]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[January 4]] ） - [[岡部長職]] 、第13代[[岸和田藩]] 主・[[外交官]] ・[[politician]] （+ [[1925]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[December 29]] ） - [[北村透谷]] 、[[詩人]] ・[[戯曲家]] （+ [[1894]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1508]] [[December 8]] ） - [[斯波義敏]] 、[[管領]] （* [[1435]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 20]] ） - [[藤堂高次]] 、[[津藩]] 主（* [[1602]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 11]] ） - [[三浦樗良]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] （* [[1729]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 20]] ） - [[月照]] 、[[Monk]] （* [[1813]] ）

[[sn:November 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 16일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十六]] [[zh:十一月十六]] [[en:draft:November 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 4]] ） - [[玉川上水]] の掘鑿が完工。翌年6月に完成 * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1747]] [[December 17]] ） - 大坂・竹本座で二世[[竹田出雲]] ・三好松洛・並木千柳の合作による人形[[Joruri]] 『[[義経千本桜]] 』が初演 * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 1st year/[[Meiwa]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1772]] [[December 10]] ） - [[東海地方|東海]] ・[[関東地方|関東]] ・[[奥羽]] の大風水害などの凶兆のため[[Meiwa]] より安永に[[改元]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1638]] [[January 1]] ） - [[後西天皇]] 、111代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1685]] ） * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1687]] [[December 20]] ） - [[秋月種弘]] 、第5代[[高鍋藩]] 主（+ [[1753]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[January 4]] ） - [[岡部長職]] 、第13代[[岸和田藩]] 主・[[外交官]] ・[[politician]] （+ [[1925]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[December 29]] ） - [[北村透谷]] 、[[詩人]] ・[[戯曲家]] （+ [[1894]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1508]] [[December 8]] ） - [[斯波義敏]] 、[[管領]] （* [[1435]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 20]] ） - [[藤堂高次]] 、[[津藩]] 主（* [[1602]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 11]] ） - [[三浦樗良]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] （* [[1729]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 20]] ） - [[月照]] 、[[Monk]] （* [[1813]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|15|11|17|10|16|12|11|1116}}

[[sn:November 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 16일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十六]] [[zh:十一月十六]] [[en:draft:November 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 4]] ） - [[玉川上水]] の掘鑿が完工。翌年6月に完成 * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1747]] [[December 17]] ） - 大坂・竹本座で二世[[竹田出雲]] ・三好松洛・並木千柳の合作による人形[[Joruri]] 『[[義経千本桜]] 』が初演 * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 1st year/[[Meiwa]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1772]] [[December 10]] ） - [[東海地方|東海]] ・[[関東地方|関東]] ・[[奥羽]] の大風水害などの凶兆のため[[Meiwa]] より安永に[[改元]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1638]] [[January 1]] ） - [[後西天皇]] 、111代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1685]] ） * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1687]] [[December 20]] ） - [[秋月種弘]] 、第5代[[高鍋藩]] 主（+ [[1753]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[January 4]] ） - [[岡部長職]] 、第13代[[岸和田藩]] 主・[[外交官]] ・[[politician]] （+ [[1925]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[December 29]] ） - [[北村透谷]] 、[[詩人]] ・[[戯曲家]] （+ [[1894]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1508]] [[December 8]] ） - [[斯波義敏]] 、[[管領]] （* [[1435]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 20]] ） - [[藤堂高次]] 、[[津藩]] 主（* [[1602]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 11]] ） - [[三浦樗良]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] （* [[1729]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 20]] ） - [[月照]] 、[[Monk]] （* [[1813]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 4]] ） - [[玉川上水]] の掘鑿が完工。翌年6月に完成 * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1747]] [[December 17]] ） - 大坂・竹本座で二世[[竹田出雲]] ・三好松洛・並木千柳の合作による人形[[Joruri]] 『[[義経千本桜]] 』が初演 * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 1st year/[[Meiwa]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1772]] [[December 10]] ） - [[東海地方|東海]] ・[[関東地方|関東]] ・[[奥羽]] の大風水害などの凶兆のため[[Meiwa]] より安永に[[改元]]

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十六]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Jōō|ja|承応|12=draft}} 2nd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1654]] [[January 4]] ） - [[玉川上水]] の掘鑿が完工。翌年6月に完成 * {{ill|Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|12=draft}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1747]] [[December 17]] ） - 大坂・竹本座で二世[[竹田出雲]] ・三好松洛・並木千柳の合作による人形[[Joruri]] 『[[義経千本桜]] 』が初演 * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 1st year/[[Meiwa]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1772]] [[December 10]] ） - [[東海地方|東海]] ・[[関東地方|関東]] ・[[奥羽]] の大風水害などの凶兆のため[[Meiwa]] より安永に[[改元]]
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 14th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1638]] [[January 1]] ） - [[後西天皇]] 、111代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1685]] ） * {{ill|Jōkyō|ja|貞享|12=draft}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1687]] [[December 20]] ） - [[秋月種弘]] 、第5代[[高鍋藩]] 主（+ [[1753]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[January 4]] ） - [[岡部長職]] 、第13代[[岸和田藩]] 主・[[外交官]] ・[[politician]] （+ [[1925]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[December 29]] ） - [[北村透谷]] 、[[詩人]] ・[[戯曲家]] （+ [[1894]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 5th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1508]] [[December 8]] ） - [[斯波義敏]] 、[[管領]] （* [[1435]] ） * {{ill|Enpō|ja|延宝|12=draft}} 4th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1676]] [[December 20]] ） - [[藤堂高次]] 、[[津藩]] 主（* [[1602]] ） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1780]] [[December 11]] ） - [[三浦樗良]] 、[[Haiku Poet]] （* [[1729]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[December 20]] ） - [[月照]] 、[[Monk]] （* [[1813]] ）

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十六]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Jōō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1654]] {{ill|January 4|ja|1月4日}}) – The excavation of the Tamagawa aqueduct was completed, with final completion in June of the following year. * In the 4th year of the Enkyō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1747]] {{ill|December 17|ja|12月17日}}) – At a performance held in Osaka at the Takemoto theater, a collaborative puppet play titled “Yoshitsune Senbon Zakura” (a production by Takeda Izumo, Miyoshi Shōraku, and Namiki Chiryū) was staged for the first time. * In the 1st year of the An'ei era / 9th year of the Meiwa era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1772]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}}) – Due to ominous signs including great wind and flooding in the Tōkai, Kantō, and Okuu regions, the era name was changed from Meiwa to An'ei.
== Births == * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1638]] {{ill|January 1|ja|1月1日}}) – Emperor Gosei, the 111th Emperor of Japan, was born (died [[1685]]). * In the 4th year of the Jōkyō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1687]] {{ill|December 20|ja|12月20日}}) – Akizuki Tanetoshi, the 5th lord of the Takanabe Domain, was born (died [[1753]]). * In the 1st year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1855]] {{ill|January 4|ja|1月4日}}) – Okabe Nagasada, the 13th lord of the Kishiwada Domain as well as a diplomat and politician, was born (died [[1925]]). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1868]] {{ill|December 29|ja|12月29日}}) – Kitamura Tōdoku, a poet and playwright, was born (died [[1894]]).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Eishō era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1508]] {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日}}) – Shibata Yoshimitsu, a senior retainer (kanrei) (born [[1435]]). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1676]] {{ill|December 20|ja|12月20日}}) – Tōdō Takatsugu, the lord of the Tsuno Domain, died (born [[1602]]). * In the 9th year of the An'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1780]] {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日}}) – Miura Shuyora, a haiku poet, died (born [[1729]]). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1858]] {{ill|December 20|ja|12月20日}}) – Gesshō, a monk, died (born [[1813]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|15|11|17|10|16|12|11|1116}}

== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Eishō era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1508]] {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日|12=draft}}) – Shibata Yoshimitsu, a senior retainer (kanrei) (born [[1435]]). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1676]] {{ill|December 20|ja|12月20日|12=draft}}) – Tōdō Takatsugu, the lord of the Tsuno Domain, died (born [[1602]]). * In the 9th year of the An'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1780]] {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日|12=draft}}) – Miura Shuyora, a haiku poet, died (born [[1729]]). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1858]] {{ill|December 20|ja|12月20日|12=draft}}) – Gesshō, a monk, died (born [[1813]]).

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十六]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Jōō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1654]] {{ill|January 4|ja|1月4日|12=draft}}) – The excavation of the Tamagawa aqueduct was completed, with final completion in June of the following year. * In the 4th year of the Enkyō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1747]] {{ill|December 17|ja|12月17日|12=draft}}) – At a performance held in Osaka at the Takemoto theater, a collaborative puppet play titled “Yoshitsune Senbon Zakura” (a production by Takeda Izumo, Miyoshi Shōraku, and Namiki Chiryū) was staged for the first time. * In the 1st year of the An'ei era / 9th year of the Meiwa era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1772]] {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日|12=draft}}) – Due to ominous signs including great wind and flooding in the Tōkai, Kantō, and Okuu regions, the era name was changed from Meiwa to An'ei.
== Births == * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1638]] {{ill|January 1|ja|1月1日|12=draft}}) – Emperor Gosei, the 111th Emperor of Japan, was born (died [[1685]]). * In the 4th year of the Jōkyō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1687]] {{ill|December 20|ja|12月20日|12=draft}}) – Akizuki Tanetoshi, the 5th lord of the Takanabe Domain, was born (died [[1753]]). * In the 1st year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1855]] {{ill|January 4|ja|1月4日|12=draft}}) – Okabe Nagasada, the 13th lord of the Kishiwada Domain as well as a diplomat and politician, was born (died [[1925]]). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1868]] {{ill|December 29|ja|12月29日|12=draft}}) – Kitamura Tōdoku, a poet and playwright, was born (died [[1894]]).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Eishō era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1508]] {{ill|December 8|ja|12月8日|12=draft}}) – Shibata Yoshimitsu, a senior retainer (kanrei) (born [[1435]]). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1676]] {{ill|December 20|ja|12月20日|12=draft}}) – Tōdō Takatsugu, the lord of the Tsuno Domain, died (born [[1602]]). * In the 9th year of the An'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1780]] {{ill|December 11|ja|12月11日|12=draft}}) – Miura Shuyora, a haiku poet, died (born [[1729]]). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1858]] {{ill|December 20|ja|12月20日|12=draft}}) – Gesshō, a monk, died (born [[1813]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|15|11|17|10|16|12|11|1116}}

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840329]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 16|qq=November 16}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Jōō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – The excavation of the Tamagawa aqueduct was completed, with final completion in June of the following year. * In the 4th year of the Enkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:December 17|December 17]]) – At a performance held in Osaka at the Takemoto theater, a collaborative puppet play titled “Yoshitsune Senbon Zakura” (a production by Takeda Izumo, Miyoshi Shōraku, and Namiki Chiryū) was staged for the first time. * In the 1st year of the An'ei era / 9th year of the Meiwa era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1772|1772]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – Due to ominous signs including great wind and flooding in the Tōkai, Kantō, and Okuu regions, the era name was changed from Meiwa to An'ei.
== Births == * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1638|1638]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – Emperor Gosei, the 111th Emperor of Japan, was born (died [[:en:1685|1685]]). * In the 4th year of the Jōkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1687|1687]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Akizuki Tanetoshi, the 5th lord of the Takanabe Domain, was born (died [[:en:1753|1753]]). * In the 1st year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – Okabe Nagasada, the 13th lord of the Kishiwada Domain as well as a diplomat and politician, was born (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 29|December 29]]) – Kitamura Tōdoku, a poet and playwright, was born (died [[:en:1894|1894]]).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Eishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1508|1508]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – Shibata Yoshimitsu, a senior retainer (kanrei) (born [[:en:1435|1435]]). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Tōdō Takatsugu, the lord of the Tsuno Domain, died (born [[:en:1602|1602]]). * In the 9th year of the An'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Miura Shuyora, a haiku poet, died (born [[:en:1729|1729]]). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Gesshō, a monk, died (born [[:en:1813|1813]]).

== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Jōō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – The excavation of the Tamagawa aqueduct was completed, with final completion in June of the following year. * In the 4th year of the Enkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:December 17|December 17]]) – At a performance held in Osaka at the Takemoto theater, a collaborative puppet play titled “Yoshitsune Senbon Zakura” (a production by Takeda Izumo, Miyoshi Shōraku, and Namiki Chiryū) was staged for the first time. * In the 1st year of the An'ei era / 9th year of the Meiwa era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1772|1772]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – Due to ominous signs including great wind and flooding in the Tōkai, Kantō, and Okuu regions, the era name was changed from Meiwa to An'ei.
== Births == * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1638|1638]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – Emperor Gosei, the 111th Emperor of Japan, was born (died [[:en:1685|1685]]). * In the 4th year of the Jōkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1687|1687]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Akizuki Tanetoshi, the 5th lord of the Takanabe Domain, was born (died [[:en:1753|1753]]). * In the 1st year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – Okabe Nagasada, the 13th lord of the Kishiwada Domain as well as a diplomat and politician, was born (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 29|December 29]]) – Kitamura Tōdoku, a poet and playwright, was born (died [[:en:1894|1894]]).

== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Jōō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – The excavation of the Tamagawa aqueduct was completed, with final completion in June of the following year. * In the 4th year of the Enkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:December 17|December 17]]) – At a performance held in Osaka at the Takemoto theater, a collaborative puppet play titled “Yoshitsune Senbon Zakura” (a production by Takeda Izumo, Miyoshi Shōraku, and Namiki Chiryū) was staged for the first time. * In the 1st year of the An'ei era / 9th year of the Meiwa era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1772|1772]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – Due to ominous signs including great wind and flooding in the Tōkai, Kantō, and Okuu regions, the era name was changed from Meiwa to An'ei.
== Births == * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1638|1638]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – Emperor Gosei, the 111th Emperor of Japan, was born (died [[:en:1685|1685]]). * In the 4th year of the Jōkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1687|1687]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Akizuki Tanetoshi, the 5th lord of the Takanabe Domain, was born (died [[:en:1753|1753]]). * In the 1st year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – Okabe Nagasada, the 13th lord of the Kishiwada Domain as well as a diplomat and politician, was born (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 29|December 29]]) – Kitamura Tōdoku, a poet and playwright, was born (died [[:en:1894|1894]]).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Eishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1508|1508]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – Shibata Yoshimitsu, a senior retainer (kanrei) (born [[:en:1435|1435]]). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Tōdō Takatsugu, the lord of the Tsuno Domain, died (born [[:en:1602|1602]]). * In the 9th year of the An'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Miura Shuyora, a haiku poet, died (born [[:en:1729|1729]]). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Gesshō, a monk, died (born [[:en:1813|1813]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十六]][[zh:十一月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840329]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 16|qq=November 16}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Jōō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – The excavation of the Tamagawa aqueduct was completed, with final completion in June of the following year. * In the 4th year of the Enkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:December 17|December 17]]) – At a performance held in Osaka at the Takemoto theater, a collaborative puppet play titled “Yoshitsune Senbon Zakura” (a production by Takeda Izumo, Miyoshi Shōraku, and Namiki Chiryū) was staged for the first time. * In the 1st year of the An'ei era / 9th year of the Meiwa era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1772|1772]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – Due to ominous signs including great wind and flooding in the Tōkai, Kantō, and Okuu regions, the era name was changed from Meiwa to An'ei.
== Births == * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1638|1638]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – Emperor Gosei, the 111th Emperor of Japan, was born (died [[:en:1685|1685]]). * In the 4th year of the Jōkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1687|1687]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Akizuki Tanetoshi, the 5th lord of the Takanabe Domain, was born (died [[:en:1753|1753]]). * In the 1st year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – Okabe Nagasada, the 13th lord of the Kishiwada Domain as well as a diplomat and politician, was born (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 29|December 29]]) – Kitamura Tōdoku, a poet and playwright, was born (died [[:en:1894|1894]]).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Eishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1508|1508]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – Shibata Yoshimitsu, a senior retainer (kanrei) (born [[:en:1435|1435]]). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Tōdō Takatsugu, the lord of the Tsuno Domain, died (born [[:en:1602|1602]]). * In the 9th year of the An'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Miura Shuyora, a haiku poet, died (born [[:en:1729|1729]]). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Gesshō, a monk, died (born [[:en:1813|1813]]).

== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Eishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1508|1508]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – Shibata Yoshimitsu, a senior retainer (kanrei) (born [[:en:1435|1435]]). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Tōdō Takatsugu, the lord of the Tsuno Domain, died (born [[:en:1602|1602]]). * In the 9th year of the An'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Miura Shuyora, a haiku poet, died (born [[:en:1729|1729]]). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Gesshō, a monk, died (born [[:en:1813|1813]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十六]][[zh:十一月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840329]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 16|qq=November 16}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Jōō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – The excavation of the Tamagawa aqueduct was completed, with final completion in June of the following year. * In the 4th year of the Enkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:December 17|December 17]]) – At a performance held in Osaka at the Takemoto theater, a collaborative puppet play titled “Yoshitsune Senbon Zakura” (a production by Takeda Izumo, Miyoshi Shōraku, and Namiki Chiryū) was staged for the first time. * In the 1st year of the An'ei era / 9th year of the Meiwa era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1772|1772]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – Due to ominous signs including great wind and flooding in the Tōkai, Kantō, and Okuu regions, the era name was changed from Meiwa to An'ei.
== Births == * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1638|1638]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – Emperor Gosei, the 111th Emperor of Japan, was born (died [[:en:1685|1685]]). * In the 4th year of the Jōkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1687|1687]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Akizuki Tanetoshi, the 5th lord of the Takanabe Domain, was born (died [[:en:1753|1753]]). * In the 1st year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – Okabe Nagasada, the 13th lord of the Kishiwada Domain as well as a diplomat and politician, was born (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 29|December 29]]) – Kitamura Tōdoku, a poet and playwright, was born (died [[:en:1894|1894]]).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Eishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1508|1508]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – Shibata Yoshimitsu, a senior retainer (kanrei) (born [[:en:1435|1435]]). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Tōdō Takatsugu, the lord of the Tsuno Domain, died (born [[:en:1602|1602]]). * In the 9th year of the An'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Miura Shuyora, a haiku poet, died (born [[:en:1729|1729]]). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Gesshō, a monk, died (born [[:en:1813|1813]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Jōō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – The excavation of the Tamagawa aqueduct was completed, with final completion in June of the following year. * In the 4th year of the Enkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:December 17|December 17]]) – At a performance held in Osaka at the Takemoto theater, a collaborative puppet play titled “Yoshitsune Senbon Zakura” (a production by Takeda Izumo, Miyoshi Shōraku, and Namiki Chiryū) was staged for the first time. * In the 1st year of the An'ei era / 9th year of the Meiwa era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1772|1772]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – Due to ominous signs including great wind and flooding in the Tōkai, Kantō, and Okuu regions, the era name was changed from Meiwa to An'ei.
== Births == * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1638|1638]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – Emperor Gosei, the 111th Emperor of Japan, was born (died [[:en:1685|1685]]). * In the 4th year of the Jōkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1687|1687]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Akizuki Tanetoshi, the 5th lord of the Takanabe Domain, was born (died [[:en:1753|1753]]). * In the 1st year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – Okabe Nagasada, the 13th lord of the Kishiwada Domain as well as a diplomat and politician, was born (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 29|December 29]]) – Kitamura Tōdoku, a poet and playwright, was born (died [[:en:1894|1894]]).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Eishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1508|1508]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – Shibata Yoshimitsu, a senior retainer (kanrei) (born [[:en:1435|1435]]). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Tōdō Takatsugu, the lord of the Tsuno Domain, died (born [[:en:1602|1602]]). * In the 9th year of the An'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Miura Shuyora, a haiku poet, died (born [[:en:1729|1729]]). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Gesshō, a monk, died (born [[:en:1813|1813]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十六]][[zh:十一月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840329]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 16|qq=November 16}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Jōō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – The excavation of the Tamagawa aqueduct was completed, with final completion in June of the following year. * In the 4th year of the Enkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:December 17|December 17]]) – At a performance held in Osaka at the Takemoto theater, a collaborative puppet play titled “Yoshitsune Senbon Zakura” (a production by Takeda Izumo, Miyoshi Shōraku, and Namiki Chiryū) was staged for the first time. * In the 1st year of the An'ei era / 9th year of the Meiwa era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1772|1772]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – Due to ominous signs including great wind and flooding in the Tōkai, Kantō, and Okuu regions, the era name was changed from Meiwa to An'ei.
== Births == * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1638|1638]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – Emperor Gosei, the 111th Emperor of Japan, was born (died [[:en:1685|1685]]). * In the 4th year of the Jōkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1687|1687]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Akizuki Tanetoshi, the 5th lord of the Takanabe Domain, was born (died [[:en:1753|1753]]). * In the 1st year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – Okabe Nagasada, the 13th lord of the Kishiwada Domain as well as a diplomat and politician, was born (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 29|December 29]]) – Kitamura Tōdoku, a poet and playwright, was born (died [[:en:1894|1894]]).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Eishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1508|1508]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – Shibata Yoshimitsu, a senior retainer (kanrei) (born [[:en:1435|1435]]). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Tōdō Takatsugu, the lord of the Tsuno Domain, died (born [[:en:1602|1602]]). * In the 9th year of the An'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Miura Shuyora, a haiku poet, died (born [[:en:1729|1729]]). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Gesshō, a monk, died (born [[:en:1813|1813]]).

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Jōō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – The excavation of the Tamagawa aqueduct was completed, with final completion in June of the following year. * In the 4th year of the Enkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:December 17|December 17]]) – At a performance held in Osaka at the Takemoto theater, a collaborative puppet play titled “Yoshitsune Senbon Zakura” (a production by Takeda Izumo, Miyoshi Shōraku, and Namiki Chiryū) was staged for the first time. * In the 1st year of the An'ei era / 9th year of the Meiwa era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1772|1772]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – Due to ominous signs including great wind and flooding in the Tōkai, Kantō, and Okuu regions, the era name was changed from Meiwa to An'ei.
== Births == * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1638|1638]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – Emperor Gosei, the 111th Emperor of Japan, was born (died [[:en:1685|1685]]). * In the 4th year of the Jōkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1687|1687]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Akizuki Tanetoshi, the 5th lord of the Takanabe Domain, was born (died [[:en:1753|1753]]). * In the 1st year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – Okabe Nagasada, the 13th lord of the Kishiwada Domain as well as a diplomat and politician, was born (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 29|December 29]]) – Kitamura Tōdoku, a poet and playwright, was born (died [[:en:1894|1894]]).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Eishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1508|1508]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – Shibata Yoshimitsu, a senior retainer (kanrei) (born [[:en:1435|1435]]). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Tōdō Takatsugu, the lord of the Tsuno Domain, died (born [[:en:1602|1602]]). * In the 9th year of the An'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Miura Shuyora, a haiku poet, died (born [[:en:1729|1729]]). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Gesshō, a monk, died (born [[:en:1813|1813]]).

== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Jōō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – The excavation of the Tamagawa aqueduct was completed, with final completion in June of the following year. * In the 4th year of the Enkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:December 17|December 17]]) – At a performance held in Osaka at the Takemoto theater, a collaborative puppet play titled “Yoshitsune Senbon Zakura” (a production by Takeda Izumo, Miyoshi Shōraku, and Namiki Chiryū) was staged for the first time. * In the 1st year of the An'ei era / 9th year of the Meiwa era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1772|1772]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – Due to ominous signs including great wind and flooding in the Tōkai, Kantō, and Okuu regions, the era name was changed from Meiwa to An'ei.
== Births == * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1638|1638]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – Emperor Gosei, the 111th Emperor of Japan, was born (died [[:en:1685|1685]]). * In the 4th year of the Jōkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1687|1687]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Akizuki Tanetoshi, the 5th lord of the Takanabe Domain, was born (died [[:en:1753|1753]]). * In the 1st year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – Okabe Nagasada, the 13th lord of the Kishiwada Domain as well as a diplomat and politician, was born (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 29|December 29]]) – Kitamura Tōdoku, a poet and playwright, was born (died [[:en:1894|1894]]).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Eishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1508|1508]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – Shibata Yoshimitsu, a senior retainer (kanrei) (born [[:en:1435|1435]]). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Tōdō Takatsugu, the lord of the Tsuno Domain, died (born [[:en:1602|1602]]). * In the 9th year of the An'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Miura Shuyora, a haiku poet, died (born [[:en:1729|1729]]). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Gesshō, a monk, died (born [[:en:1813|1813]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 16일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月十六]][[zh:十一月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 16일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月十六]][[zh:十一月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十六]][[zh:十一月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840329]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 16|qq=November 16}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Jōō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1654|1654]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – The excavation of the Tamagawa aqueduct was completed, with final completion in June of the following year. * In the 4th year of the Enkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:December 17|December 17]]) – At a performance held in Osaka at the Takemoto theater, a collaborative puppet play titled “Yoshitsune Senbon Zakura” (a production by Takeda Izumo, Miyoshi Shōraku, and Namiki Chiryū) was staged for the first time. * In the 1st year of the An'ei era / 9th year of the Meiwa era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1772|1772]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – Due to ominous signs including great wind and flooding in the Tōkai, Kantō, and Okuu regions, the era name was changed from Meiwa to An'ei.
== Births == * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1638|1638]] [[:en:January 1|January 1]]) – Emperor Gosei, the 111th Emperor of Japan, was born (died [[:en:1685|1685]]). * In the 4th year of the Jōkyō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1687|1687]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Akizuki Tanetoshi, the 5th lord of the Takanabe Domain, was born (died [[:en:1753|1753]]). * In the 1st year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:January 4|January 4]]) – Okabe Nagasada, the 13th lord of the Kishiwada Domain as well as a diplomat and politician, was born (died [[:en:1925|1925]]). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:December 29|December 29]]) – Kitamura Tōdoku, a poet and playwright, was born (died [[:en:1894|1894]]).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Eishō era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1508|1508]] [[:en:December 8|December 8]]) – Shibata Yoshimitsu, a senior retainer (kanrei) (born [[:en:1435|1435]]). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1676|1676]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Tōdō Takatsugu, the lord of the Tsuno Domain, died (born [[:en:1602|1602]]). * In the 9th year of the An'ei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1780|1780]] [[:en:December 11|December 11]]) – Miura Shuyora, a haiku poet, died (born [[:en:1729|1729]]). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:December 20|December 20]]) – Gesshō, a monk, died (born [[:en:1813|1813]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十六]][[zh:十一月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十六]][[zh:十一月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十六]][[zh:十一月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840329]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:36, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 16|qq=November 16}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Jōō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1654|en|1654|WD=Q6970|lt=1654}} {{ill|January 4|en|January 4|WD=Q2168|lt=January 4}}) – The excavation of the Tamagawa aqueduct was completed, with final completion in June of the following year. * In the 4th year of the Enkyō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1747|en|1747|WD=Q7596|lt=1747}} {{ill|December 17|en|December 17|WD=Q2413|lt=December 17}}) – At a performance held in Osaka at the Takemoto theater, a collaborative puppet play titled “Yoshitsune Senbon Zakura” (a production by Takeda Izumo, Miyoshi Shōraku, and Namiki Chiryū) was staged for the first time. * In the 1st year of the An'ei era / 9th year of the Meiwa era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1772|en|1772|WD=Q7690|lt=1772}} {{ill|December 10|en|December 10|WD=Q2302|lt=December 10}}) – Due to ominous signs including great wind and flooding in the Tōkai, Kantō, and Okuu regions, the era name was changed from Meiwa to An'ei.
== Births == * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1638|en|1638|WD=Q6893|lt=1638}} {{ill|January 1|en|January 1|WD=Q2150|lt=January 1}}) – Emperor Gosei, the 111th Emperor of Japan, was born (died {{ill|1685|en|1685|WD=Q7660|lt=1685}}). * In the 4th year of the Jōkyō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1687|en|1687|WD=Q7668|lt=1687}} {{ill|December 20|en|December 20|WD=Q2455|lt=December 20}}) – Akizuki Tanetoshi, the 5th lord of the Takanabe Domain, was born (died {{ill|1753|en|1753|WD=Q7621|lt=1753}}). * In the 1st year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1855|en|1855|WD=Q7673|lt=1855}} {{ill|January 4|en|January 4|WD=Q2168|lt=January 4}}) – Okabe Nagasada, the 13th lord of the Kishiwada Domain as well as a diplomat and politician, was born (died {{ill|1925|en|1925|WD=Q18107|lt=1925}}). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|December 29|en|December 29|WD=Q2862|lt=December 29}}) – Kitamura Tōdoku, a poet and playwright, was born (died {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894}}).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Eishō era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1508|en|1508|WD=Q6170|lt=1508}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8}}) – Shibata Yoshimitsu, a senior retainer (kanrei) (born {{ill|1435|en|1435|WD=Q6362|lt=1435}}). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1676|en|1676|WD=Q7628|lt=1676}} {{ill|December 20|en|December 20|WD=Q2455|lt=December 20}}) – Tōdō Takatsugu, the lord of the Tsuno Domain, died (born {{ill|1602|en|1602|WD=Q6727|lt=1602}}). * In the 9th year of the An'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1780|en|1780|WD=Q7716|lt=1780}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11}}) – Miura Shuyora, a haiku poet, died (born {{ill|1729|en|1729|WD=Q6952|lt=1729}}). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}} {{ill|December 20|en|December 20|WD=Q2455|lt=December 20}}) – Gesshō, a monk, died (born {{ill|1813|en|1813|WD=Q6937|lt=1813}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|15|11|17|10|16|12|11|1116|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十六]]
{{translated page|ja|11月16日 (旧暦)|version=91329511|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:November 16 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 11월 16일]] [[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十一月十六]]
[[ar:November 16 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十六]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月十六]] {{wikidata link|Q840329}} [[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Days 16 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar November]] [[Category:Tomobiki]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
