revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十六]][[zh:十一月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十六]][[zh:十一月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十六]][[zh:十一月十六]]
{{Not to be confused with|November 16|qq=November 16}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Jōō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1654|en|1654|WD=Q6970|lt=1654}} {{ill|January 4|en|January 4|WD=Q2168|lt=January 4}}) – The excavation of the Tamagawa aqueduct was completed, with final completion in June of the following year. * In the 4th year of the Enkyō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1747|en|1747|WD=Q7596|lt=1747}} {{ill|December 17|en|December 17|WD=Q2413|lt=December 17}}) – At a performance held in Osaka at the Takemoto theater, a collaborative puppet play titled “Yoshitsune Senbon Zakura” (a production by Takeda Izumo, Miyoshi Shōraku, and Namiki Chiryū) was staged for the first time. * In the 1st year of the An'ei era / 9th year of the Meiwa era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1772|en|1772|WD=Q7690|lt=1772}} {{ill|December 10|en|December 10|WD=Q2302|lt=December 10}}) – Due to ominous signs including great wind and flooding in the Tōkai, Kantō, and Okuu regions, the era name was changed from Meiwa to An'ei.
== Births == * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1638|en|1638|WD=Q6893|lt=1638}} {{ill|January 1|en|January 1|WD=Q2150|lt=January 1}}) – Emperor Gosei, the 111th Emperor of Japan, was born (died {{ill|1685|en|1685|WD=Q7660|lt=1685}}). * In the 4th year of the Jōkyō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1687|en|1687|WD=Q7668|lt=1687}} {{ill|December 20|en|December 20|WD=Q2455|lt=December 20}}) – Akizuki Tanetoshi, the 5th lord of the Takanabe Domain, was born (died {{ill|1753|en|1753|WD=Q7621|lt=1753}}). * In the 1st year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1855|en|1855|WD=Q7673|lt=1855}} {{ill|January 4|en|January 4|WD=Q2168|lt=January 4}}) – Okabe Nagasada, the 13th lord of the Kishiwada Domain as well as a diplomat and politician, was born (died {{ill|1925|en|1925|WD=Q18107|lt=1925}}). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|December 29|en|December 29|WD=Q2862|lt=December 29}}) – Kitamura Tōdoku, a poet and playwright, was born (died {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894}}).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Eishō era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1508|en|1508|WD=Q6170|lt=1508}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8}}) – Shibata Yoshimitsu, a senior retainer (kanrei) (born {{ill|1435|en|1435|WD=Q6362|lt=1435}}). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1676|en|1676|WD=Q7628|lt=1676}} {{ill|December 20|en|December 20|WD=Q2455|lt=December 20}}) – Tōdō Takatsugu, the lord of the Tsuno Domain, died (born {{ill|1602|en|1602|WD=Q6727|lt=1602}}). * In the 9th year of the An'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1780|en|1780|WD=Q7716|lt=1780}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11}}) – Miura Shuyora, a haiku poet, died (born {{ill|1729|en|1729|WD=Q6952|lt=1729}}). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}} {{ill|December 20|en|December 20|WD=Q2455|lt=December 20}}) – Gesshō, a monk, died (born {{ill|1813|en|1813|WD=Q6937|lt=1813}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|15|11|17|10|16|12|11|1116|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十六]][[zh:十一月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十六]][[zh:十一月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月十六]][[zh:十一月十六]]
{{Not to be confused with|November 16|qq=November 16}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * In the 2nd year of the Jōō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1654|en|1654|WD=Q6970|lt=1654|1=1654}} {{ill|January 4|en|January 4|WD=Q2168|lt=January 4|1=January 4}}) – The excavation of the Tamagawa aqueduct was completed, with final completion in June of the following year. * In the 4th year of the Enkyō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1747|en|1747|WD=Q7596|lt=1747|1=1747}} {{ill|December 17|en|December 17|WD=Q2413|lt=December 17|1=December 17}}) – At a performance held in Osaka at the Takemoto theater, a collaborative puppet play titled “Yoshitsune Senbon Zakura” (a production by Takeda Izumo, Miyoshi Shōraku, and Namiki Chiryū) was staged for the first time. * In the 1st year of the An'ei era / 9th year of the Meiwa era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1772|en|1772|WD=Q7690|lt=1772|1=1772}} {{ill|December 10|en|December 10|WD=Q2302|lt=December 10|1=December 10}}) – Due to ominous signs including great wind and flooding in the Tōkai, Kantō, and Okuu regions, the era name was changed from Meiwa to An'ei.
== Births == * In the 14th year of the Kan'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1638|en|1638|WD=Q6893|lt=1638|1=1638}} {{ill|January 1|en|January 1|WD=Q2150|lt=January 1|1=January 1}}) – Emperor Gosei, the 111th Emperor of Japan, was born (died {{ill|1685|en|1685|WD=Q7660|lt=1685|1=1685}}). * In the 4th year of the Jōkyō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1687|en|1687|WD=Q7668|lt=1687|1=1687}} {{ill|December 20|en|December 20|WD=Q2455|lt=December 20|1=December 20}}) – Akizuki Tanetoshi, the 5th lord of the Takanabe Domain, was born (died {{ill|1753|en|1753|WD=Q7621|lt=1753|1=1753}}). * In the 1st year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1855|en|1855|WD=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}} {{ill|January 4|en|January 4|WD=Q2168|lt=January 4|1=January 4}}) – Okabe Nagasada, the 13th lord of the Kishiwada Domain as well as a diplomat and politician, was born (died {{ill|1925|en|1925|WD=Q18107|lt=1925|1=1925}}). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|December 29|en|December 29|WD=Q2862|lt=December 29|1=December 29}}) – Kitamura Tōdoku, a poet and playwright, was born (died {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894|1=1894}}).
== Deaths == * In the 5th year of the Eishō era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1508|en|1508|WD=Q6170|lt=1508|1=1508}} {{ill|December 8|en|December 8|WD=Q2301|lt=December 8|1=December 8}}) – Shibata Yoshimitsu, a senior retainer (kanrei) (born {{ill|1435|en|1435|WD=Q6362|lt=1435|1=1435}}). * In the 4th year of the Enpō era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1676|en|1676|WD=Q7628|lt=1676|1=1676}} {{ill|December 20|en|December 20|WD=Q2455|lt=December 20|1=December 20}}) – Tōdō Takatsugu, the lord of the Tsuno Domain, died (born {{ill|1602|en|1602|WD=Q6727|lt=1602|1=1602}}). * In the 9th year of the An'ei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1780|en|1780|WD=Q7716|lt=1780|1=1780}} {{ill|December 11|en|December 11|WD=Q2363|lt=December 11|1=December 11}}) – Miura Shuyora, a haiku poet, died (born {{ill|1729|en|1729|WD=Q6952|lt=1729|1=1729}}). * In the 5th year of the Ansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} {{ill|December 20|en|December 20|WD=Q2455|lt=December 20|1=December 20}}) – Gesshō, a monk, died (born {{ill|1813|en|1813|WD=Q6937|lt=1813|1=1813}}).
